chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI I.A.No.110 of 2024 1. For order on CMA No.265 of 2025 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1904/24 ------ 17.02.2025 Mr. Fazal Rahim Yousufzai, advocate for the appellant. Ms. Saima Khan Solangi, advocate for respondent. = 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. After hearing this appeal at some length, we dispose it of with consent with the observations that appellant shall furnish a surety of entire decretal outstanding amount before the trial Court within ten days without fail. After such surety is deposited, the trial Court shall proceed with the matter expeditiously on merits and conclude it preferably within two months without fail. This appeal is disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
